title: festuca rubra var. fallax
intro: Festuca rubra var. fallax, also known as red fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca rubra var. fallax include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures made by steeping the dried grass in hot water or a solvent to extract its bioactive compounds.
